title: You Get What You Give
album: You Get What You Give - Single
why_this_song: You Get What You Give by New Radicals (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Don't let go"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Don't give up"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You've got the music in you"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You've got the music in you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Frenemies, who, when you're down, ain't your friend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "give" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "give" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But when the night is falling
You've got a reason to live

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One, two, one, two, three, ow
This whole damn world can fall apart

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "You Get What You Give", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "You Get What You Give", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "You Get What You Give" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "You Get What You Give" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "You Get What You Give" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "You Get What You Give", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
